effortModel.citation: SRS steady-state: 10 new/day = ~100 review cards/day (Anki 10× rule); r/Anki DP-25,26

expectedStrategy: 5-5-5 session: 5min yesterday's review, 5min 10 new words, 5min random quiz from last 30
2000 ÷ 10 = 200 days — if JLPT deadline <200 days: prioritize top 1200-1500 high-frequency
warnings: Day 14-21 pile-up risk (NOT Day 30): 10 new/day → ~100 reviews/day steady state
15+ new/day → Day 14 review count exceeds 15min budget → burnout
Early warning rule: if reviews hit 50+ by Day 14, reduce new cards to 5/day
alternatives: Option A: top 1200-1500 high-frequency words first if JLPT date is approaching
Option B: increase to 20min/day to safely do 15 new words/day
hardFailChecks: SRS pile-up warning MUST reference Day 14-21 (not Day 30 — too late)
must NOT allow 15+ new/day without strong warning
must explain Anki 10× rule (10 new → 100 reviews in steady state)
toneExpectation: steady, sustainable, SRS-mechanics-aware; streak resilience (missing days is okay, just restart)
